data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_RydelGreeting: Well, well, what have we here?\nA most energetic customer!\pMe? You may call me RYDEL.\nI'm the owner of this cycle shop.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_DidYouComeFro: RYDEL: Your RUNNING SHOES...\nThey're awfully filthy.\pDid you come from far away?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_GuessYouDontN: RYDEL: Is that right?\pThen, I guess you have no need for\nany of my BIKES.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_ExplainBikesC:
RYDEL: Hm, hm... ... ... ... ...
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pYou're saying that you came all this
way from LITTLEROOT?\pMy goodness!
That's ridiculously far!\pIf you had one of my BIKES, you could
go anywhere easily while feeling the\lgentle caress of the wind!\pI'll tell you what!
I'll give you a BIKE!\pOh, wait a second!\pI forgot to tell you that there are
two kinds of BIKES!\pThey are the MACH BIKE and the
ACRO BIKE!\pMACH BIKE is for cyclists who want
to feel the wind with their bodies!\pAnd an ACRO BIKE is for those who
prefer technical rides!\pI'm a real sweetheart, so you can
have whichever one you like!\pWhich one will you choose?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_ComeBackToSwi: RYDEL: If you get the urge to switch\nBIKES, just come see me!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_WantToSwitchB: RYDEL: Oh? Were you thinking about\nswitching BIKES?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_IllSwitchBike: RYDEL: Okay, no problem!\nI'll switch BIKES for you!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_ExchangedMach: {PLAYER} got the MACH BIKE exchanged\nfor an ACRO BIKE.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_ExchangedAcro: {PLAYER} got the ACRO BIKE exchanged\nfor a MACH BIKE.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_HappyYouLikeI: RYDEL: Good, good!\nI'm happy that you like it!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_OhYourBikeIsI:
Oh? What happened to that BIKE I
gave you?\pOh, I get it, you stored it using your PC.\pWell, take it out of PC storage,
and I'll be happy to exchange it!\pMay the wind always be at your back
on your adventure!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_HandbooksAreI: I'm learning about BIKES while\nI work here.\pIf you need advice on how to ride your\nBIKE, there're a couple handbooks in\lthe back.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_MachHandbookW: It's a handbook on the MACH BIKE.\pWhich page do you want to read?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_HowToRideMach: A BIKE moves in the direction that\nthe + Control Pad is pressed.\pIt will speed up once it gets rolling.\pTo stop, release the + Control Pad.\nThe BIKE will slow to a stop.\pWant to read a different page?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_HowToTurnMach:
A MACH BIKE is speedy, but it can't
stop very quickly.\pIt gets a little tricky to get around
a corner.\pRelease the + Control Pad a little
before the corner and slow down.\pWant to read a different page?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_SandySlopes:
There are small sandy slopes throughout
the HOENN region.\pThe loose, crumbly sand makes it
impossible to climb normally.\pBut if you have a MACH BIKE, you can
zip up a sandy slope.\pWant to read a different page?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_AcroHandbookW: It's a handbook on the ACRO BIKE.\pWhich page do you want to read?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_Wheelies: Press the B Button while riding, and the\nfront wheel lifts up.\pYou can zip around with the front\nwheel up using the + Control Pad.\pThis technique is called a wheelie.\pWant to read a different page?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_BunnyHops: Keeping the B Button pressed, your\nBIKE can hop on the spot.\pThis technique is called a bunny hop.\pYou can ride while hopping, too.\pWant to read a different page?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_Jumps:
Press the B Button and the + Control
Pad at the same time to jump.\pPress the + Control Pad to the side
to jump sideways.\pPress it backwards to make the BIKE
change directions while jumping.\pWant to read a different page?
